query: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("cool roof*" OR "green roof*" OR "living roof*" OR "vegetated roof*" OR "rooftop garden*" OR "reflective roof*" OR "albedo roof*" OR "white roof*" OR "cool roofing" OR "green roofing" OR "roof* albedo" OR "high-albedo roof*") AND (temperature* OR "ambient temperature" OR "surface temperature" OR "air temperature" OR "heat island*" OR "urban heat island*" OR "urban heat" OR "thermal comfort" OR "heat stress" OR mortality OR morbidity OR "health outcome*" OR "heat-related illness*" OR "heat-related mortalit*" OR "cardiovascular" OR "respiratory") AND ("randomized controlled trial*" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment*" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "instrumental variable*" OR "causal inference" OR "intervention stud*" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "random assignment" OR "treatment effect*" OR "impact evaluation" OR "controlled trial*" OR "field experiment*" OR "policy evaluation" OR randomized OR experimental OR causal OR impact))
